name: Sai Vivek Madisetti
headline: Cybersecurity Researcher & Full-Stack Developer | Blockchain, Federated Learning & ML Enthusiast
bio: BTech in CSE (Cybersecurity) at IIIT Kottayam with a strong passion for building secure, intelligent systems. Experienced in research on drone security with Blockchain and Federated Learning. I love creating full-stack applications and machine learning pipelines that solve real-world problems.

description: Researching and developing security solutions for the Application Layer of Drone Communication.
Implementing cutting-edge technologies including Blockchain and Federated Learning to enhance drone security and data privacy.

experience.company: Training and Placement Cell, IIIT Kottayam
description: Leading campus recruitment logistics, acting as a key bridge between students and top-tier recruiters.
Strengthened leadership, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills by managing placement drives.

education.institution: Indian Institute of Information Technology Kottayam
description: Relevant Courses: Operating Systems, Database Management, Computer Networks, Data Structures

projects.title: MedSecure - Biometric Cloud Storage System
projects.description: Developed a secure biometric cloud storage system for medical files. Fragments encrypted data across distributed nodes and uses AI-powered face recognition (96.2% accuracy) with WebAuthn for multi-factor authentication.

projects.title: Lifestyle Health Risk Prediction using ML
projects.description: Built a predictive ML pipeline on a 5,000-record healthcare dataset to classify health risk levels. Achieved 88.9% accuracy using XGBoost after extensive EDA and feature engineering.

projects.title: TempChat - Anonymous Chat Platform
projects.description: A secure anonymous chat platform where rooms self-destruct after use. Features end-to-end encryption, message expiration, zero data persistence, and real-time delivery via WebSockets.

projects.title: Hostel Complaint System
projects.description: Role-based web app to automate hostel complaint resolution. Features RBAC (Student/Warden/Admin), automated workflow, real-time notifications, and a centralized dashboard.

projects.title: Tour Management System
projects.description: Full-featured system to automate travel booking operations. Includes tour browsing, online booking with payment integration, accommodation management, and customizable travel preferences.

recommendations.text: Sai Vivek is a brilliant cybersecurity researcher and developer. His work on the MedSecure project showcases a deep understanding of both security principles and practical implementation.
recommendations.name: Prof. C.R.E.A.T.E Labs
recommendations.title: Research Supervisor

recommendations.text: As a Placement Coordinator, Sai was incredibly organized and proactive. He played a key role in successfully managing our campus recruitment drives and bridging the gap between students and companies.
recommendations.name: Placement Committee
recommendations.title: IIIT Kottayam

recommendations.text: His project on health risk prediction is very impressive. He doesn't just build things; he understands the data behind them and focuses on real accuracy and impact.
recommendations.name: Hackathon Judge
recommendations.title: IEEE Kerala Chapter
